content.problemStatement:
Alice is given two arrays AAA and BBB, each consisting of NNN integers. Note that both arrays have **1-based indexing**.

She can perform the following operation on array AAA any number of times:


Choose any 2≤i≤N−22 \leq i \leq N-22≤i≤N−2 and update the values of Ai−1,Ai,Ai+1,Ai+2A_{i-1} , A_{i} , A_{i+1} , A_{i+2}Ai−1​,Ai​,Ai+1​,Ai+2​ as following :

Ai−1A_{i-1}Ai−1​ = Ai−1+Ai+Ai+1A_{i-1} + A_{i} + A_{i+1}Ai−1​+Ai​+Ai+1​
AiA_{i}Ai​ = −Ai+1-A_{i+1}−Ai+1​
Ai+1A_{i+1}Ai+1​ = −Ai-A_{i}−Ai​
Ai+2A_{i+2}Ai+2​ = Ai+2+Ai+1+AiA_{i+2} + A_{i+1} + A_{i}Ai+2​+Ai+1​+Ai​


Note: The new values of Ai−1,Ai,Ai+1,Ai+2A_{i-1} , A_{i} , A_{i+1} , A_{i+2}Ai−1​,Ai​,Ai+1​,Ai+2​ are updated simultaneously using the old values.

Find whether it is possible to transform the array AAA to BBB using any number of operations.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains a integer NNN — the length of the arrays.
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers - values of the array AAA .
The third line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers - values of the array BBB .




Output Format
For each test case, print `Yes` if it is possible to transform array AAA into array BBB using any number of operations, otherwise print `No`.


You may print each character of the string in uppercase or lowercase (for example, the strings `YES`, `yEs`, `yes`, and `yeS` will all be treated as identical).
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 2⋅1052\cdot 10^52⋅105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: Both the arrays are already same so no operation is needed.
Test case 222: There is no sequence of operations using which array AAA can be transformed into array BBB .
Test case 333: In this case, after applying the operation on index 222 the transformed array is [1,−4,3,1][1,-4,3,1][1,−4,3,1] which is same as array BBB .
